pages.text: Woven Cruor is a special material that is infused with the Blood of a $(l:observations/vampirism)Vampire$(/l). It is a tough materials, that can offer benefits to Vampires when made into $(l:artifacts/clothing/vampire_clothing)Clothing$(/l)

pages.title: Making Woven Cruor
pages.text: The Player must be a Vampire of Level 4 or above, and have enough blood available in their blood pool$(p)$(8)1 > $()Place a block of $(item)White Wool$()$(br)$(8)2 > $()Use a $(l:resources/bone_needle)Bone Needle$(/l) on the block of Wool to make $(l:resources/blood_stained_wool)Blood-stained Wool$(/l)$(br)$(8)3 > $()Break the Blood-stained Wool and smelt it.
